channel.title: 急診熊心聲
channel.itunes:author: 曹建雄 Bear
channel.description: 急診醫師 Bear 用自己的聲音，把想了解的主題經過多重查核後講給你聽。醫學、時事、知識，研究＋查證＋朗讀，通勤路上聽。
channel.itunes:summary: 急診醫師 Bear 的個人知識型 podcast：任何主題經 AI 研究＋對抗式查核後、以本人聲音合成朗讀。

item.title: EP01 美伊關係現況：三個月戰爭後的停火草案
item.description:
美伊關係現況——三個月戰爭後的停火草案（2026/5 整理）。

⚠️ 本集由 AI 協助研究＋多重查核後、以主持人聲音合成製作，內容僅供參考、不構成專業建議；引用來源如下，歡迎自行查證。

查核可信度：82/100。這次查核擋掉了多處數字與框架失準：伊朗鎮壓死亡人數（原稿6,126/5,000嚴重低估，已退回只報政府承認的3,117並改成中性分歧）、女校死亡數（170→官方最終156）、MOU「60天」框架（Axios實為30天談判期）、Kalshi機率時間窗口（55%是10月前、非年底）、WTI 91美元（是預測情境非實際值）、c42「休息站」比喻（無法核實已移除），並更正Blumenfeld身份（約翰霍普金斯非路透）、c34簽署狀態（雙方均未確認）。最終稿移除/改寫21項、保留17項confirmed、5點標為來源分歧，維持Bear白話口語可直接唸，整體可信度高，剩餘不確定多來自付費牆/403無法直驗

來源分歧點：

  • MOU後續談判期是30天還是60天：Axios原文寫30天談判期、CNN等報導寫60天框架，兩者並存，最終稿不鎖定60天。
  • 是否已簽署：美方官員轉述伊朗代表稱已獲伊方批准、準備簽，但伊朗官方未公開證實、塔斯尼姆稱文本未定稿，川普也未拍板——雙方均未正式確認。
  • 伊朗對那批高濃縮鈾提過什麼方案（降濃回協議上限、伊美沙聯合稀釋機構）：全為伊朗單方面說法（含伊朗議員），美方從未公開證實此類提案存在。
  • 胡塞武裝攻擊以色列日期：多數來源報3/28，PBS顯示3/29，研判為時區差異；最終稿以「三月底」中性處理。
  • 四月停火的促成功勞：巴基斯坦居中斡旋，但伊朗最高領袖批准據報還有中國最後一刻施壓，巴基斯坦非唯一決定性因素。

參考來源（31 筆）：

  • [2026-05-28] Iran peace deal hinges on Trump approval (MOU draft) — https://www.axios.com/2026/05/28/iran-peace-deal-trump-approval
  • [2026-05-29] Trump's 'room to maneuver' narrows as US-Iran close in on framework deal — https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/trumps-room-maneuver-narrows-us-iran-close-framework-deal-2026-05-29/
  • [2025-06-14] Iran says nuclear talks with US meaningless as Trump pushes for a deal (6th round cancelled) — https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/6/14/iran-says-nuclear-talks-with-us-meaningless-as-trump-pushes-for-a-deal
  • [2025-09-27] Impending deadline for UN action on Iran: what the snapback of Iran sanctions could mean — https://www.crowell.com/en/insights/client-alerts/impending-deadline-for-un-action-on-iran-what-the-snapback-of-iran-sanctions-could-mean-for-global-business
  • [2026-02-15] 2025–2026 Iranian protests (cross-check) — https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2025%E2%80%932026_Iranian_protests
  • [2026-05-26] 2026 Iran war (Operation Epic Fury, casualties, blockade, oil) — https://www.britannica.com/event/2026-Iran-war
  • [2026-04-28] 2026 Minab school attack — https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Minab_school_attack
  • [2026-03] Mojtaba Khamenei chosen as successor — https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo
  • [2026-05-04] US intelligence indicates limited new damage to Iran's nuclear program — https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/us-intelligence-indicates-limited-new-damage-irans-nuclear-program-sources-say-2026-05-04/
  • [2026-03] Grossi: reconstruction 'very possible', you cannot unlearn what you've learned — https://www.jpost.com/middle-east/iran-news/article-890694
  • [2026-05-22] Iran's enriched uranium stockpile: can it be safely transferred? — https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/22/irans-enriched-uranium-stockpile-can-it-be-safely-transferred
  • [2026-05-21] Supreme leader says enriched uranium must stay in Iran — https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/supreme-leader-says-enriched-uranium-must-stay-iran-iranian-sources-say-2026-05-21/
  • [2026-05-18] Pakistan's mediation faces limits as Iran-US tensions deepen — https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/18/pakistans-mediation-faces-limits-as-iran-us-tensions-deepen
  • [2026-02-25] US issues new sanctions as it dials up pressure on Iran (12 vessels) — https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/2/25/us-issues-new-sanctions-as-it-dials-up-pressure-on-iran
  • [2026-05-28] US imposes sanctions on Iranian agency controlling Strait of Hormuz shipping — https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/u-s-imposes-sanctions-on-iranian-agency-trying-to-control-shipping-in-the-strait-of-hormuz
  • [2026-05-26] US naval blockade: 108 vessels redirected (CENTCOM) — https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-us-strikes-peace-talks-ceasefire/
  • [2026] Strait of Hormuz closure risks greatest global energy supply shock in decades — https://www.woodmac.com/press-releases/strait-of-hormuz-closure-risks-greatest-global-energy-supply-shock-in-decades/
  • [2026-04-13] Von der Leyen statement: EUR 22bn higher fossil fuel bill in 44 days — https://ec.europa.eu/commission/presscorner/detail/en/statement_26_800
  • [2026-05-07] Strait of Hormuz crisis: fertilizer scarcity will affect next harvests (FAO) — https://reliefweb.int/report/world/strait-hormuz-crisis-fertilizer-scarcity-will-affect-next-harvests-and-food-supplies-fao-warns-enit
  • [2026-05-22] Congressional report tallies 42 US aircraft lost or damaged in Operation Epic Fury — https://www.militarytimes.com/news/pentagon-congress/2026/05/22/congressional-report-tallies-42-us-aircraft-lost-or-damaged-in-operation-epic-fury/
  • [2026-03-29] Houthi missile attack on Israel raises Red Sea shipping concerns — https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/a-houthi-missile-attack-on-israel-raises-concerns-about-red-sea-shipping-routes-being-blocked
  • [2026-05-26] Israel expands ground operation in south Lebanon; cumulative toll — https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/israel-expands-ground-operation-beyond-yellow-line-south-lebanon-clashes-2026-05-26/
  • [2026-05-19] Soufan Center IntelBrief (Kataib Hezbollah commander arrest) — https://thesoufancenter.org/intelbrief-2026-may-19/
  • [2026-02-26] 2025–2026 Iran–United States negotiations (Oman/Geneva mediation) — https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2025%E2%80%932026_Iran%E2%80%93United_States_negotiations
  • [2026-04-11] US-Iran talks set to begin in Islamabad (Vance-Ghalibaf, 21 hours) — https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/11/us-iran-talks-set-to-begin-in-islamabad-after-delegations-arrive.html
  • [2026-05-28] GOP lawmakers pressure Trump on Iran (Graham, Wicker) — https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/5892991-gop-lawmakers-pressure-trump-iran/
  • [2026-05-27] Why a US-Iran deal no longer matters (MOU vs JCPOA, Farsi) — https://www.madamasr.com/en/2026/05/27/feature/politics/why-a-us-iran-deal-no-longer-matters/
  • [2026-05-24] Iran International: US obstructing asset unfreezing; $12bn Qatar precondition — https://www.iranintl.com/en/202605244481
  • [2026-04-09] Iran war ceasefire: Tehran crowds wave flags, state media calls it victory — https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2026/04/09/iran-war-ceasefire-trump-negotiations/
  • [2026-05-28] Kalshi: US-Iran nuclear deal prediction market — https://kalshi.com/markets/kxusairanagreement/us-iran-nuclear-deal/kxusairanagreement-27
  • [2026-03-25] How Trump's Iran war objectives have shifted over time — https://www.npr.org/2026/03/25/nx-s1-5759721/how-trumps-iran-war-objectives-have-shifted-over-time
item.content:encoded:
美伊關係現況——三個月戰爭後的停火草案（2026/5 整理）。

⚠️ 本集由 AI 協助研究＋多重查核後、以主持人聲音合成製作，內容僅供參考、不構成專業建議；引用來源如下，歡迎自行查證。

查核可信度：82/100。這次查核擋掉了多處數字與框架失準：伊朗鎮壓死亡人數（原稿6,126/5,000嚴重低估，已退回只報政府承認的3,117並改成中性分歧）、女校死亡數（170→官方最終156）、MOU「60天」框架（Axios實為30天談判期）、Kalshi機率時間窗口（55%是10月前、非年底）、WTI 91美元（是預測情境非實際值）、c42「休息站」比喻（無法核實已移除），並更正Blumenfeld身份（約翰霍普金斯非路透）、c34簽署狀態（雙方均未確認）。最終稿移除/改寫21項、保留17項confirmed、5點標為來源分歧，維持Bear白話口語可直接唸，整體可信度高，剩餘不確定多來自付費牆/403無法直驗

來源分歧點：

  • MOU後續談判期是30天還是60天：Axios原文寫30天談判期、CNN等報導寫60天框架，兩者並存，最終稿不鎖定60天。
  • 是否已簽署：美方官員轉述伊朗代表稱已獲伊方批准、準備簽，但伊朗官方未公開證實、塔斯尼姆稱文本未定稿，川普也未拍板——雙方均未正式確認。
  • 伊朗對那批高濃縮鈾提過什麼方案（降濃回協議上限、伊美沙聯合稀釋機構）：全為伊朗單方面說法（含伊朗議員），美方從未公開證實此類提案存在。
  • 胡塞武裝攻擊以色列日期：多數來源報3/28，PBS顯示3/29，研判為時區差異；最終稿以「三月底」中性處理。
  • 四月停火的促成功勞：巴基斯坦居中斡旋，但伊朗最高領袖批准據報還有中國最後一刻施壓，巴基斯坦非唯一決定性因素。

參考來源（31 筆）：

  • [2026-05-28] Iran peace deal hinges on Trump approval (MOU draft) — https://www.axios.com/2026/05/28/iran-peace-deal-trump-approval
  • [2026-05-29] Trump's 'room to maneuver' narrows as US-Iran close in on framework deal — https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/trumps-room-maneuver-narrows-us-iran-close-framework-deal-2026-05-29/
  • [2025-06-14] Iran says nuclear talks with US meaningless as Trump pushes for a deal (6th round cancelled) — https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/6/14/iran-says-nuclear-talks-with-us-meaningless-as-trump-pushes-for-a-deal
  • [2025-09-27] Impending deadline for UN action on Iran: what the snapback of Iran sanctions could mean — https://www.crowell.com/en/insights/client-alerts/impending-deadline-for-un-action-on-iran-what-the-snapback-of-iran-sanctions-could-mean-for-global-business
  • [2026-02-15] 2025–2026 Iranian protests (cross-check) — https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2025%E2%80%932026_Iranian_protests
  • [2026-05-26] 2026 Iran war (Operation Epic Fury, casualties, blockade, oil) — https://www.britannica.com/event/2026-Iran-war
  • [2026-04-28] 2026 Minab school attack — https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Minab_school_attack
  • [2026-03] Mojtaba Khamenei chosen as successor — https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo
  • [2026-05-04] US intelligence indicates limited new damage to Iran's nuclear program — https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/us-intelligence-indicates-limited-new-damage-irans-nuclear-program-sources-say-2026-05-04/
  • [2026-03] Grossi: reconstruction 'very possible', you cannot unlearn what you've learned — https://www.jpost.com/middle-east/iran-news/article-890694
  • [2026-05-22] Iran's enriched uranium stockpile: can it be safely transferred? — https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/22/irans-enriched-uranium-stockpile-can-it-be-safely-transferred
  • [2026-05-21] Supreme leader says enriched uranium must stay in Iran — https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/supreme-leader-says-enriched-uranium-must-stay-iran-iranian-sources-say-2026-05-21/
  • [2026-05-18] Pakistan's mediation faces limits as Iran-US tensions deepen — https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/18/pakistans-mediation-faces-limits-as-iran-us-tensions-deepen
  • [2026-02-25] US issues new sanctions as it dials up pressure on Iran (12 vessels) — https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/2/25/us-issues-new-sanctions-as-it-dials-up-pressure-on-iran
  • [2026-05-28] US imposes sanctions on Iranian agency controlling Strait of Hormuz shipping — https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/u-s-imposes-sanctions-on-iranian-agency-trying-to-control-shipping-in-the-strait-of-hormuz
  • [2026-05-26] US naval blockade: 108 vessels redirected (CENTCOM) — https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-us-strikes-peace-talks-ceasefire/
  • [2026] Strait of Hormuz closure risks greatest global energy supply shock in decades — https://www.woodmac.com/press-releases/strait-of-hormuz-closure-risks-greatest-global-energy-supply-shock-in-decades/
  • [2026-04-13] Von der Leyen statement: EUR 22bn higher fossil fuel bill in 44 days — https://ec.europa.eu/commission/presscorner/detail/en/statement_26_800
  • [2026-05-07] Strait of Hormuz crisis: fertilizer scarcity will affect next harvests (FAO) — https://reliefweb.int/report/world/strait-hormuz-crisis-fertilizer-scarcity-will-affect-next-harvests-and-food-supplies-fao-warns-enit
  • [2026-05-22] Congressional report tallies 42 US aircraft lost or damaged in Operation Epic Fury — https://www.militarytimes.com/news/pentagon-congress/2026/05/22/congressional-report-tallies-42-us-aircraft-lost-or-damaged-in-operation-epic-fury/
  • [2026-03-29] Houthi missile attack on Israel raises Red Sea shipping concerns — https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/a-houthi-missile-attack-on-israel-raises-concerns-about-red-sea-shipping-routes-being-blocked
  • [2026-05-26] Israel expands ground operation in south Lebanon; cumulative toll — https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/israel-expands-ground-operation-beyond-yellow-line-south-lebanon-clashes-2026-05-26/
  • [2026-05-19] Soufan Center IntelBrief (Kataib Hezbollah commander arrest) — https://thesoufancenter.org/intelbrief-2026-may-19/
  • [2026-02-26] 2025–2026 Iran–United States negotiations (Oman/Geneva mediation) — https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2025%E2%80%932026_Iran%E2%80%93United_States_negotiations
  • [2026-04-11] US-Iran talks set to begin in Islamabad (Vance-Ghalibaf, 21 hours) — https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/11/us-iran-talks-set-to-begin-in-islamabad-after-delegations-arrive.html
  • [2026-05-28] GOP lawmakers pressure Trump on Iran (Graham, Wicker) — https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/5892991-gop-lawmakers-pressure-trump-iran/
  • [2026-05-27] Why a US-Iran deal no longer matters (MOU vs JCPOA, Farsi) — https://www.madamasr.com/en/2026/05/27/feature/politics/why-a-us-iran-deal-no-longer-matters/
  • [2026-05-24] Iran International: US obstructing asset unfreezing; $12bn Qatar precondition — https://www.iranintl.com/en/202605244481
  • [2026-04-09] Iran war ceasefire: Tehran crowds wave flags, state media calls it victory — https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2026/04/09/iran-war-ceasefire-trump-negotiations/
  • [2026-05-28] Kalshi: US-Iran nuclear deal prediction market — https://kalshi.com/markets/kxusairanagreement/us-iran-nuclear-deal/kxusairanagreement-27
  • [2026-03-25] How Trump's Iran war objectives have shifted over time — https://www.npr.org/2026/03/25/nx-s1-5759721/how-trumps-iran-war-objectives-have-shifted-over-time
